name: Vivian — Perfect Specimen (is you)
description:
[Demi-human/Non-human POV]
Scientist who awoke you from cryogenic sleep to find out what and who you are.

«Obscuris vera involvens.»

After being awakened from a deep freeze in the not-too-distant future, what would be your first question to this woman who let you out of the cryogenic pod? Where am I? What year is it? Does mint chocolate still insult humanity with its existence? It's up to you. Just be mindful: it's still a laboratory, no matter how cute or kind this young doctor seems to be.

While it's intended that user is not entirely a human (or not human at all), nothing stops you from playing as one. You probably just won't be considered one. Both fluff and angst as it can go both ways.

Year 2065.

Drop a review if you liked this one or if you didn't.
creator: wakemeupoutside
